hero.title: Invest in Farm Animals,
hero.subtitle: Connect with verified Kazakhstani farmers. Fund livestock, track growth, and share in the profits — all without owning a single animal.

howItWorks.title: How Tabyn Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps from investment to profit

step1.title: Choose an Animal
step1.description: Browse verified livestock listings from trusted farmers across Kazakhstan. See expected returns, duration, and full farmer profiles.

step2.title: Invest Your Capital
step2.description: Select how much you want to invest. The farmer raises and maintains the animal — you track progress from your dashboard.

step3.title: Share the Profit
step3.description: When the animal is sold, 70% of the profit goes to you. The farmer receives 30% for their work. Simple, transparent, fair.

passive.title: Passive Income
passive.description: Your capital works while farmers do the work. No farm management required.

transparent.title: Transparent Returns
transparent.description: Clear profit-sharing ratios. See exactly what you earn before you invest.

lowEntry.title: Low Entry Point
lowEntry.description: Start investing from as little as ₸50,000. Diversify across multiple animals.

tracked.title: Fully Tracked
tracked.description: Real-time status updates on your animals' health, growth, and sale progress.

capital.title: Access to Capital
capital.description: Get funding for livestock without bank loans or collateral requirements.

noUpfront.title: No Upfront Costs
noUpfront.description: Investors cover the purchase price. Focus on what you do best — raising animals.

fair.title: Fair Profit Share
fair.description: Earn 30% of the profit for your expertise and hard work. Plus you keep your farm.

grow.title: Scale Your Herd
grow.description: Use the platform to grow your livestock numbers without increasing your own risk.

featuredAnimals.title: Available Now
featuredAnimals.subtitle: Browse active investment opportunities from verified farmers

profitSharing.title: Transparent 70/30 Split
profitSharing.subtitle: Every investment follows the same clear formula
profitSharing.investorDesc: You receive 70% of all profits from the animal sale
profitSharing.farmerDesc: The farmer earns 30% for their expertise and care

verified.title: Verified Farmers
verified.description: Every farmer is vetted, ID-checked, and reviewed before listing animals.

legal.title: Legal Agreements
legal.description: Investment contracts are legally binding and documented for your protection.

updates.title: Regular Updates
updates.description: Farmers post status updates. You always know how your animal is doing.

support.title: Dedicated Support
support.description: Our team is available to help investors and farmers at every step.

footer.tagline: Инвестируйте в скот — получайте реальный доход.

login.subtitle: Log in to your Tabyn account
